title: Hach's CraftTweaks
description: Hach's CraftTweaks is a bunch of crafting tweaks i did for stuff that i find a bit inconvenient
body:
## Hach's CraftTweaks is a bunch of crafting tweaks i did for stuff that i find a bit inconvenient

### Includes:
- Classic 1.8 Enchanted Golden Apple (Notch apple) Recipe
- Charcoal from bamboo blocks, so you don't have to mine for coal as much.
- Uncraft some items, such as you being able to turn wool back into 4 string, and leather into 4 rabbit hide
- And Many More!

**Hope you enjoy!**
